source_sniff.notes: The model_index author row uses Jose/Frederic variants, while the first-page Markdown shows Veronica/Florent. No title mismatch or alternate MinerU run ambiguity was found.

notes: Primary Markdown contains the main-text model description and source equations, but the paper states that the log-linear model and full Calvo pricing derivation are in an online appendix not present as a local normalization file.
No implementation cross-check file exists for US_VGMP15.
No PDF body was opened; raw PDF existence was checked only for provenance.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper.
